content.body:
Replaces all occurrences of "founder" with "owner" in 25 markdown
files — agents, rules, skills, docs, and context. The term "owner"
is more neutral and appropriate for the role of the person who
holds decision authority.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: refactor(core): rename "founder" to "owner" across all docs
